Flow.description: Test fixture autolaunched flow that echoes its input string to its output, used by Revenant integration tests to exercise flow invocation.

assignments.description: Copies the inputVal request value into the outputVal result variable.
assignments.name: Assign_Values
assignments.label: Assign Values

Flow.label: Test Autolaunched Flow

variables.description: Input string supplied by the caller and echoed to outputVal.
variables.name: inputVal

variables.description: Output string returned to the caller, set from inputVal.
variables.name: outputVal
